purpose: Separate list of non-correct Threats of the Galaxy feats with descriptions and proposed implementation homes.

entries.name: A Few Maneuvers
entries.description: When piloting a vehicle of Colossal size or smaller, you grant a +2 dodge bonus to your vehicle's Reflex Defense. If you are the target of a missile or torpedo attack and the attack roll misses by 5 or more, the projectile self-destructs harmlessly.
entries.expectedRuleShape: While piloting a qualifying vehicle, add +2 dodge bonus to that vehicle's Reflex Defense. If a missile/torpedo targeting you misses by 5+, it self-destructs harmlessly.
entries.observedImplementation: abilityMeta describes vehicle_piloting_defense_context and vehicle defense metadata, but no proven vehicle Reflex Defense consumer, piloted-vehicle binding, projectile-type miss margin hook, or self-destruct resolution exists in the uploaded baseline.
entries.accuracyFinding: Correct context metadata, but not runtime-correct until vehicle defense and missile/torpedo miss-margin handling are wired.

entries.name: Momentum Strike
entries.description: When riding a beast as a mount or riding/on a speeder bike as passenger or pilot, add +1 weapon die of damage to melee attacks if the mount or vehicle has already moved at least its speed this turn.
entries.expectedRuleShape: On a melee attack while riding a mount/speeder, if that mount/vehicle has already moved at least its speed this turn, add +1 die of weapon damage.
entries.observedImplementation: attack_option style metadata exists, but no proven mount/speeder occupancy state, per-turn movement-distance check, melee-only damage-die upgrade, or damage formula consumer exists.
entries.accuracyFinding: Should not be a flat damage bonus. It needs movement-state and vehicle/mount context before adding an extra weapon die.

entries.name: Mounted Defense
entries.description: When riding a beast as a mount or riding/on a speeder bike, once per encounter after an attack roll against you is known but before damage/effects resolve, redirect that attack to your mount or vehicle instead.
entries.expectedRuleShape: Once per encounter, after an attack roll against the rider is determined but before damage/effects resolve, redirect the attack to the mount/speeder vehicle.
entries.observedImplementation: reaction/table-context metadata exists, but no proven incoming attack interception point, rider/mount target swap, once-per-encounter use tracking, or damage/effect retargeting workflow exists.
entries.accuracyFinding: Correctly excluded from static sheet math, but not runtime-correct until attack interception and target-redirection are implemented.

entries.name: Suppression Fire
entries.description: When using Aid Another to impose a penalty to an enemy's attack rolls, if your attack roll exceeds the target's Will Defense, that enemy must end its next turn in cover from you if possible. Targets of equal or higher level are immune. This is a mind-affecting fear effect.
entries.expectedRuleShape: During Aid Another used to penalize enemy attacks, compare the attack roll to target Will Defense; if it exceeds Will and the target is lower level, apply a fear/mind-affecting battlefield-positioning rider requiring cover by end of next turn if possible.
entries.observedImplementation: aid_another_rider metadata exists, but no proven Aid Another penalty-mode detection, Will Defense comparison consumer, target-level immunity check, mind-affecting/fear immunity handling, or next-turn cover-positioning state exists.
entries.accuracyFinding: This is not a static attack penalty. It needs Aid Another mode, Will/level/immunity checks, and mostly GM-assisted cover-positioning resolution.
